boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on exemption-status class
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CERT-JAD-090 states exemption certificate TX-44 remains pending, violating STD-JAD-090-P requirement for exemption-status class before sale

final_answer: The source boundary remains open. CERT-JAD-090 confirms that exemption certificate TX-44 is pending, which directly violates STD-JAD-090-P requiring an exact exemption-status class match before sale. WARN-JAD-090 reinforces the verification prerequisite. The action boundary cannot be satisfied because the controlling exemption-status class is unresolved prior to the 2026-06-28 execution date. Therefore, operations may not release the tax-exempt sale.
